main_issues: 图像 001 is visibly and statistically cool/cyan, with average neutral RGB about [125.24, 133.85, 137.08] and R-B about -11.84.
图像 002 is close to neutral, with average neutral RGB about [129.31, 129.21, 128.90].
图像 003 is slightly warm on average, with average neutral RGB about [127.22, 125.94, 124.80].
The most consistent cross-roll issue is muted low-chroma color rather than one shared color cast.
next_step: Add a conservative post-balance saturation/chroma boost in the source TIFF grading path, then rerun 图像 001.fff, 图像 002.fff, and 图像 003.fff to compare contact sheets and stats.
